title: Redland City Council Community Support Grant
summary: Council grants care about public benefit, value for money, delivery skill, risk control, milestone reporting and final acquittal. Do not wait until the portal deadline to collect evidence.
action: Build grant-readiness-checklist.md and milestone-report.md before applying.

title: Indigenous.gov.au Grants
summary: Check who is actually eligible before drafting. Some programs are restricted, invited or require Indigenous governance. Cultural permission is not a writing detail; it is a project foundation.
action: Confirm applicant authority, partner role, permissions and public wording before any notice is published.
